title: fissia mutica
intro: Fissia mutica, also known as the Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Asia. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Fissia mutica has been found to possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent cardiovascular disease. Fissia mutica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, capsules, and powders, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
